key_decisions.original_text: ETH/70 required for Glamsterdam if gas limit exceeds 80M
EPBS DevNet 1 launching tomorrow with Alpha 4 spec
Glamsterdam DevNet 0 will not include new EIPs beyond Ball+EPBS merge
External builder API must be tested in isolation before Ball+EPBS merge
key_decisions.context: API testing in isolation before merge

key_decisions.original_text: Next week's ACD Testing call (April 6) cancelled for Easter Monday
